description: Correct the timestamp of a Vitals encounter for patient Arnulfo Kertzmann. A batch of vitals was entered with today's date in error, but they were actually taken during a visit on January 15, 2025 at 14:00 (2:00 PM). Update the encounter date/time to 2025-01-15 14:00 for the record associated with that visit. Do not modify the clinical values (height/weight/BP). Login credentials: admin / Admin123.
